prior_findings.evidence: README.md lines 278-283: systemMessage reminder now lists only ['be quick', 'just do it', 'trivial fix'] with explicit note that bare 'minimal'/'trivial' are NOT accepted. Matches override library at lines 237-239, 568-569.
README.md line 626: Verification Criteria now reads 'hooks/hooks.json at plugin root'. Stale '.claude-plugin/hooks.json' reference removed.
README.md line 637: Top-level Verification Criteria now reads 'PSR (post-Stage-5 re-review) subsection + active-feature marker steps'. Deprecated 'Stage 5b post-commit' label removed.

README.md lines 499-503: Integration test now sequences HEAD=A (allow), advance to B (block), add both PSR markers (allow). Unit test test_hook3_psr_marker_sha_mismatch.py covers dual-file enforcement logic. Acceptable at integration level.

README.md lines 378-383: Phase 3 now calls git rev-parse --show-toplevel once at top, uses <repo_root>/specs/.tlmforge_active_feature for marker read, reuses resolved root for glob. Redundant second call explicitly removed. test_hook3_cwd_subdirectory.py updated to cover both marker + glob (line 427-428).

new_findings.finding: Phase 4 internal verification block still reads 'Stage 5b section has post-commit re-review subsection'. The top-level Verification Criteria was correctly updated (line 637) but this local checklist item was missed. An implementer checking Phase 4 completion against this line would look for a 'Stage 5b section' in SKILL.md that does not exist under that name.
new_findings.suggested_fix: Change line 474 to: 'SKILL.md PSR (post-Stage-5 re-review) subsection exists'

summary: All round-2 findings are resolved. One new nit found: stale 'Stage 5b' label in Phase 4 internal verification block (line 474) — the same label fixed at the top-level checklist but missed at this secondary location. Not a blocker. Plan is approved to proceed to implementation.
